hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Initialize Godmode for the current project (Claude Code). Detects project type, validates configuration, and sets up the .godmode directory if needed.

hooks.name: init
hooks.description: Platform-agnostic initialization. Performs the same stack detection and .godmode setup as session-start, and additionally detects the calling platform (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode) to print tailored guidance. Can be invoked from any platform's session start mechanism.

hooks.name: session-end-notify
hooks.command: if [ -f .godmode/session-state.json ] && ! grep -q '"stop_reason"' .godmode/session-state.json 2>/dev/null; then echo 'GODMODE: Session interrupted. Run /godmode to resume from round '$(jq -r .round .godmode/session-state.json)'.'; fi
hooks.description: Notify user to resume interrupted godmode session
